name: Integration - LLM Fallback on Primary Failure
description: Simulates a failure in the primary LLM model and verifies that the backup model is used via the /api/assistant/llm endpoint.
input: POST to /api/assistant/llm with user_prompt and context, while mocking the primary LLM to fail.
output: JSON response with success: true and a response generated by the backup model.
success_criteria: Backup model is used when primary fails
error_scenarios: Both primary and backup LLM models fail
